title: ✨ High-End UI/UX Design Overhaul 🚀
message: We have introduced glassmorphic UI cards and an offline interactive engine layer to elevate your mobility progress tracing logs seamlessly.
points: 🗺️ Muscle Map Navigation: Direct quick-warp routing via visual interaction directly inside the Statistics Tab body models.
⚔️ RPG Mobility Tree: Earn localized attribute XP parameters to visualize joint optimization benchmarks over deep timelines.
🔒 Monitored Security Rules: Automated internal lock checks keeping localized databases isolated without high network computing cost operations.
⚡ Frame-Rate Refinements: Enhanced animation parameters utilizing physics curves to offer lightning fast responsive views.
